arts.ttl: Atalanta vs Inter: a fight for the Scudetto
arts.sum: Across the last 15 league matches between Atalanta and Inter in Bergamo: both sides have recorded four wins each, seven draws and scored 21 goals apiece. Atalanta are yet to win in their five league matches at the Gewiss Stadium in 2025 (D4 L1), drawing each of the last three; the Bergamaschi have not recorded four consecutive home draws in Serie A since the period between January and April 2007 (five in that case).
